markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Cody Bellinger records 4+ hits in the Minnesota vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Cody Bellinger is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Cody Bellinger starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Cody Bellinger is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Cody Bellinger is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on hits recorded.
markets.title: Cody Bellinger: 4+ hits?

markets.rules_primary: If Gerrit Cole records 4+ strikeouts in the Minnesota vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Gerrit Cole is scratched or is not a starting pitcher, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Gerrit Cole is not a starting pitcher but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, relief appearances will not count towards this market.
If Gerrit Cole is a starting pitcher and records at least one pitch the market will settle based on strikeouts recorded.

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Cody Bellinger records 3+ RBIs in Minnesota vs New York Y professional baseball game originally scheduled for Jul 3, 2026 at 7:05 PM EDT, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Cody Bellinger is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Cody Bellinger starts the game but does not record a plate appearance, the market will resolve to the fair market price.
If Cody Bellinger is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Cody Bellinger is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on RBIs recorded.
